(Q2) Change in Care Needs CHAR 1 Discharge potential and overall status: overall change in care needs. 0 = No Change, 1 = Improved - receives fewer supports, needs less restrictive level of care, 2 = Deteriorated - receives more support.
532 R1A R1A_ASMT_PART_RES (R1A) Resident Participated in Assessment CHAR 1 Assessment/discharge information: participation in assessment - resident. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
533 R1B R1B_ASMT_PART_FAM (R1B) Family Participation in Assessment CHAR 1
